sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀναζητέω

- Transliteration: Anazeteo

- Phonetic: an-ad-zay-teh'-o

- Definition:

1. to seek out, search through, make diligent search

- Origin: from G303 and G2212

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G303 and G2212; to search out: - seek.
